nasb.text: Then the leaders of Israel, the heads of their fathers’ households, made an offering (they were the leaders of the tribes; they were the ones who were over the numbered men).

esv.text: the chiefs of Israel, heads of their fathers’ houses, who were the chiefs of the tribes, who were over those who were listed, approached

cnv.text: 以色列的眾領袖，就是他們父家的首領，都來奉獻；就是眾支派的領袖，是管理那些被數點的人的。

ccb.text: 然后，以色列各支派的首领，就是负责人口统计的各族长，都来奉献。
